data.title: Implement svg_gen.py: regenerate wireframe.svg from updated spatial-layout.json
data.description:
## What
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/svg_gen.py with generate_svg() that produces a valid wireframe.svg from the merged spatial-layout.json.

## testing_mode: RED — new behavioral content. Depends on RED test task 38d8-1a58.

## Interface
generate_svg(spatial_layout: dict) -> str
Returns: SVG XML string conforming to the Required SVG Structure from output-format-reference.md.

## SVG Structure (from output-format-reference.md)
- Root: <svg xmlns='...' viewBox='0 0 1440 900'>
- <defs><style>...</style></defs> with .container, .component, .tag-new, .tag-modified CSS classes
- One <g id='{component.id}'> per component, nested to match JSON hierarchy
- <rect> element inside each <g> using absoluteBoundingBox for position/size
- tag=NEW → add class='tag-new' to <g>; tag=MODIFIED → class='tag-modified'
- Use xml.etree.ElementTree for XML generation (stdlib, no new deps)

## Implementation Steps
1. Parse spatial_layout['components'] recursively
2. For each component, create <g id='{id}' class='{tag_class}'> with nested <rect> for bounds
3. Build SVG tree using xml.etree.ElementTree
4. Write <defs><style> with required CSS classes
5. Return ET.tostring(root, encoding='unicode')

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/svg_gen.py exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/svg_gen.py
- [ ] pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_svg.py exits 0 (SG-1 through SG-7 pass)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/unit/test_figma_merge_svg.py --tb=short -q
- [ ] Uses stdlib xml.etree.ElementTree (no lxml or other external XML dep)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'lxml\|bs4\|BeautifulSoup' plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/svg_gen.py
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
